message:
feat(output): Add tracing and debugging infrastructure for output detection

- Add tracing logs to detection.rs (TRACE for env checks, DEBUG for flow, INFO for decisions)
- Add agent/CI/IDE environment detection functions with known env var lists
- Add OutputModeReport struct for comprehensive detection debugging
- Add `ms doctor --check output` command for output mode diagnostics
- Add MS_DEBUG_OUTPUT env var support for per-command debugging
- Re-export new detection functions in output module

This provides visibility into why output mode decisions are made,
helping debug issues when output appears plain when expected rich
or vice versa.

Related: bd-1ttq

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
